code:
import io
import string
import list

let t_opt = io.read_line()
let t = match t_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let body = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < list.len(tokens)
  match list.get(tokens, i)
  when Some(tok)
    if tok == t
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("count=#{count}")
